hero.headline: Precision EPE Foam Packaging
hero.subtitle: Custom EPE foam solutions for industrial components
hero.description: High-quality EPE foam packaging for automotive, electronics, tooling, and industrial components.

about.heading: About EPE Foam Packaging
about.content: Our EPE foam solutions provide superior protection, impact resistance, and custom fit for delicate industrial components. Ideal for shipping, storage, and transport.

features.title: Impact Protection
features.desc: Excellent shock-absorbing properties cushion fragile products, dampening impact and vibration during transport.

features.title: Custom Cut Foam
features.desc: Precision-machined cavities tailor-made to match product contours, preventing parts from sliding or clashing.

features.title: Antistatic Options
features.desc: Available with ESD protection additives to safely dissipate electrostatic charges for delicate electronics.

features.title: Reusable Dunnage
features.desc: Highly resilient structures designed for repeated use in closed-loop logistics and internal plant handling.

applications.title: Automotive
applications.desc: Protects critical components like instrument panels, lights, and engines from transit damage.

applications.title: Electronics
applications.desc: Shields sensitive PCBs, semiconductor devices, and high-value modules from ESD and drop hazards.

applications.title: Industrial Components
applications.desc: Provides robust cushioning for heavy machinery parts, tools, and metal sub-assemblies.

hero.headline: XLPE Foam Solutions
hero.subtitle: Durable foam protection for sensitive components
hero.description: XLPE foam designed for high impact resistance and long-lasting durability.

about.heading: About XLPE Foam Packaging
about.content: XLPE foam provides excellent cushioning and protection for delicate or heavy components. Perfect for industrial transport and long-term storage.

features.title: High Durability
features.desc: Resistant to wear, tear, and multiple impacts, offering long-lasting product protection in demanding environments.

features.title: Custom Shape Options
features.desc: Fine cell structure allows precise routing, laser-cutting, and multi-layer laminations for complex parts.

features.title: Recyclable Material
features.desc: Environmentally friendly, non-crosslinked alternative options that support corporate sustainability goals.

features.title: Lightweight Protection
features.desc: Adds virtually no extra weight to shipments, reducing fuel costs and freight expenses.

applications.title: Automotive
applications.desc: Custom trays and dunnage inserts to secure body panels, engine parts, and trim pieces.

applications.title: Insulating
applications.desc: Provides excellent thermal insulation and moisture resistance for HVAC, aerospace, and construction components.

hero.headline: Reliable PU Foam Packaging
hero.subtitle: Impact and vibration protection for industrial components
hero.description: Custom PU foam solutions designed for protection, delicate cushioning, and efficient storage.

about.heading: About PU Foam Packaging
about.content: PU foam offers lightweight, flexible, and protective packaging ideal for sensitive industrial components during transport and storage.

features.title: Lightweight Material
features.desc: Extremely low density provides delicate cushioning without adding bulk or cargo weight.

features.title: Shock Absorption
features.desc: Open-cell structure compresses easily to absorb micro-shocks, ideal for delicate and lightweight items.

features.title: Custom Designs
features.desc: Easily molded, profile-cut, or egg-crate shaped to wrap around irregular surfaces seamlessly.

features.title: Reusable
features.desc: Resilient foam returns to its original shape after compression, perfect for storage cases and kits.

applications.title: Automotive
applications.desc: Protects mirrors, interior trims, and electronic dials from scratching during assembly.

applications.title: Electronics
applications.desc: Soft lining for enclosures and transit cases carrying sensors, cameras, and measurement devices.

applications.title: Consumer Goods
applications.desc: Premium packaging inserts for consumer products, diagnostics, and retail equipment.

hero.headline: Antistatic Foam Packaging
hero.subtitle: Protect your sensitive electronic components
hero.description: Electrostatic-safe foam solutions for electronics and sensitive industrial parts.

about.heading: About Antistatic Foam
about.content: Specialized foam designed to prevent electrostatic discharge (ESD) damage, ideal for electronics and sensitive components.

features.title: ESD Safe
features.desc: Engineered with anti-static agents to control surface resistivity, preventing electrostatic charge buildup.

features.title: Custom Cuts
features.desc: Tailored trays and boxes keep components separated, organized, and physically protected.

features.title: Impact Resistant
features.desc: Combines electrical safety with excellent physical cushioning to prevent mechanical drop damage.

features.title: Reusable
features.desc: Maintains its antistatic properties over multiple uses, making it cost-effective for assembly lines.

applications.title: Electronics
applications.desc: Safe storage for static-sensitive computer boards, microchips, and electronic sub-assemblies.

applications.title: Circuit Boards
applications.desc: Custom-grooved foam trays hold PCBs upright and secure during manufacturing and testing.

applications.title: Industrial Sensors
applications.desc: Shields precision gauges and transceivers from both physical shock and electrostatic fields.

applications.title: Medical Devices
applications.desc: Ensures sterile and ESD-safe transit for diagnostic tools, pumps, and sensitive monitors.

hero.headline: Automotive Dunnage Solutions
hero.subtitle: Custom foam for automotive component protection
hero.description: Protect critical automotive parts with precision-engineered foam packaging.

about.heading: About Automotive Dunnage
about.content: Our automotive dunnage foam is designed to securely hold components during transport and assembly, preventing damage and vibration.

features.title: Custom Fit
features.desc: Individually contoured slots align with complex automotive parts to eliminate shipping scratches.

features.title: Impact Resistant
features.desc: Prevents metal-on-metal contact, keeping painted, chrome, and structural parts in pristine condition.

features.title: Lightweight
features.desc: Facilitates easy manual handling and quick insertion of components into transport racks.

features.title: Reusable
features.desc: Long lifespan in factory-to-dealer loops, drastically reducing single-use packaging waste.

applications.title: Automotive Components
applications.desc: Designed for transport racks carrying door panels, grilles, fenders, and mirrors.

applications.title: Engine Parts
applications.desc: Holds heavy pistons, valves, and metal components securely without tearing.

applications.title: Suspension Systems
applications.desc: Absorbs vibration for steering gears, shock absorbers, and heavy axle assemblies.

applications.title: Electronics Modules
applications.desc: Protects electronic control units (ECUs) and wiring harnesses from mechanical shocks.

hero.headline: Trolley Dunnage
hero.subtitle: Efficient transport and storage protection
hero.description: Custom foam trays for trolleys and mobile storage units.

about.heading: About Trolley Dunnage
about.content: Foam designed to fit trolleys perfectly, keeping products safe from shocks and vibrations during transport within factories or warehouses.

features.title: Custom Trays
features.desc: Molded or routed trays designed to drop perfectly into standard factory push-carts and trolleys.

features.title: Impact Resistant
features.desc: Dampens floor vibrations and collision shocks as trolleys move across factory floors.

features.title: Lightweight
features.desc: Reduces overall cart weight, enabling operators to move loaded trolleys with minimal effort.

features.title: Reusable
features.desc: Extremely rugged construction tolerates chemical exposure and continuous warehouse use.

applications.title: Manufacturing
applications.desc: Secures components at work-in-progress stations during multi-stage assembly.

applications.title: Warehouse
applications.desc: Organizes picking bins and storage shelves, protecting materials from dust and friction.

applications.title: Assembly Lines
applications.desc: Delivers kitted parts directly to operators in the exact sequence and orientation needed.

hero.headline: Tool Kit Foam Packaging
hero.subtitle: Protective foam for tools and kits
hero.description: Custom foam solutions to hold tools safely in kits or trays.

about.heading: About Tool Kit Foam
about.content: Foam inserts designed to hold tools securely, preventing scratches, movement, or impact damage during storage and transport.

features.title: Custom Inserts
features.desc: Multi-layered two-tone shadow boards make missing tools instantly visible at a glance.

features.title: Impact Resistant
features.desc: Prevents tools, calibrators, and micrometers from clashing and losing calibration.

features.title: Lightweight
features.desc: Ideal for portable field technician kits, flight cases, and mobile maintenance setups.

features.title: Reusable
features.desc: Dense foam resists oil, grease, and industrial solvents, maintaining its shape for years.

applications.title: Tool Kits
applications.desc: Organizes screwdrivers, wrenches, sockets, and specialty equipment in heavy-duty cases.

applications.title: Hardware Storage
applications.desc: Secures fasteners, drill bits, and specialized fittings in structured drawer trays.

applications.title: Industrial Components
applications.desc: Protects high-value inspection gauges, lasers, and optical measurement devices.

hero.headline: Defence Packaging
hero.subtitle: High-Performance Protective Solutions
hero.description: Designed for critical equipment safety and heavy-duty impact protection.

about.heading: About Defence Packaging
about.content: Defence packaging solutions engineered for safely packaging, stacking, and transporting heavy ammunition, sensitive equipment, and critical components in extreme environments.

features.title: Heavy-duty impact protection
features.desc: Engineered to survive extreme shock and drop tests from military vehicles and transport aircraft.

features.title: Precision-cut foam dunnage
features.desc: Custom configurations secure heavy munitions, weapon systems, and communication sets.

features.title: Antistatic XLPE foam (10⁹ Ohm)
features.desc: Provides high-grade, permanent electrostatic shielding for explosive initiators and guidance systems.

features.title: Moisture & dust resistant
features.desc: Closed-cell foam blocks water ingress and dust contamination in demanding field deployments.

features.title: Reusable rugged crate system
features.desc: Integrates with ruggedized cases and pallets for long-term storage and repeated deployments.

features.title: Designed for critical equipment safety
features.desc: Meets strict defense standards for chemical neutrality, preventing corrosion on metals.

applications.title: Military Hardware
applications.desc: Provides heavy cushioning for firearms, weapon mounts, and tactical gear.

applications.title: Ammunition & Explosives
applications.desc: Secures shells, fuses, and propellants in static-free, impact-resistant compartments.

applications.title: Sensitive Communication Equipment
applications.desc: Protects field radios, radar units, and ruggedized laptops from extreme vibrations.

applications.title: Aerospace Components
applications.desc: Supports critical aircraft parts and avionics modules during logistics and depot transit.

hero.headline: Custom Industrial Gaskets
hero.subtitle: High-performance sealing solutions for industrial assemblies
hero.description: Precision-engineered gaskets designed for sealing, spacing, vibration dampening, and industrial component protection.

about.heading: About Industrial Gaskets
about.content: Our custom industrial gaskets are fabricated from premium elastomeric and foam materials. Engineered to provide exceptional resistance to dust, moisture, temperature, and chemicals, they ensure long-term sealing reliability and dimensional stability in harsh environments.

features.title: Custom Cut Profiles
features.desc: Precision kiss-cut or die-cut profiles to fit exact housing designs and bolt patterns.

features.title: Sealing Support
features.desc: Provides reliable compression deflection to block dust, air, and moisture.

features.title: Industrial Fitment
features.desc: Engineered thickness options ensure a perfect fit between mating metal or plastic flanges.

features.title: Material Options
features.desc: Available in EPDM, Neoprene, Silicone, and Polyethylene foam to match environmental conditions.

applications.title: Automotive Assemblies
applications.desc: Seals tail lights, side mirrors, HVAC ducts, and engine compartments against water ingress.

applications.title: Industrial Equipment
applications.desc: Prevents dust and coolant leaks in machine enclosures and industrial control panels.

applications.title: Electrical Enclosures
applications.desc: Meets IP-rated seal requirements to protect wiring, relays, and components from rain.

applications.title: Machine Components
applications.desc: Dampens vibration and isolates noise between moving structural plates.
